title: Muslin Cloths for Baby, Baby Muslin Squares, Burp Cloths for Boys and Girls, Swaddle Wrap, Pink, 3 Pack
features: MUSLIN CLOTHS - Pure cotton baby muslin squares.
BABY BURP CLOTHS - These muslin squares are very absorbent, making them perfect for burping and feeding.

ESSENTIAL BABY ITEM - These muslin cloths are suitable for winding, cleaning, nappy changing, breast or bottle feeding and catching dribbles! The large size also makes these squares suitable for swaddling!
SAFE & SOFT - The 100% cotton material is breathable and gentle on your baby's delicate skin.
description: These muslin squares are essential to have on hand, ready for swaddling, unexpected spills and protecting your clothes against dribbles as well as a multitude of other uses! Chose from 3 pack or 6 pack in either White, Cream, Pink, Blue or Grey. Perfect for a new baby or a baby shower present for an expecting parent. Each square is 71cm x 71cm and 100% cotton - making it easy care, super soft and kind to baby's delicate skin.
